description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-search

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-search/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Input, icon, clear button, border. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. search role. aria-label. Clear button labeling. Suggestions (combobox pattern if applicable).
3. **Functionality** — Search input. Clear button. Search icon. Debounced input event. Form integration. Expandable mode.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Icon positioning. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Input. Clear. Debounce. Keyboard (Enter, Escape).
8. **Storybook** — Default. Expandable. With suggestions. In header.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Search block. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-search
